final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot-topic banner.

Style/medium: documentary photojournalism, mobile phone candid photography aesthetic
Composition: wide 16:9 banner, horizontal panoramic, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: urban cityscape at dusk, neon lights beginning to illuminate, sunset reflections on high-rise buildings
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, strong light-shadow contrast, golden hour transitioning to night
Color palette: warm sunset tones, neon accents, cool twilight blues
Materials/textures: photorealistic, sharp details
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal layout, professional editorial quality, authentic on-site documentary feel
Avoid:
